title: Realistic block
description: Realistic 64x texture pack that modifies blocks and more
body:
**Realistic Block adds 64x texture, giving them a more realistic look, increased depth and total immersion.**

![aze](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da1e6d552ef1b1aeb69ef59d4042872650fb6f2f.png)




<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



</details>

ATTENTION
This texture pack is still in development, so any bugs or other issues are normal. My friend and I are currently working on it, so please excuse any problems you might encounter.

Thank you for your patience.







Experience Minecraft like never before with this ultra-realistic texture pack. Every block has been carefully redesigned in 64x resolution to offer stunning details, enhanced depth, and a truly immersive atmosphere. Perfect for players who want a modern and polished look for their world.

**I strongly recommend installing  mod alongside Sodium to get more FPS.**
